default.heading: Wanted Ad
default.body: First invent a ridiculous outlaw, then help the town turn them into legend.

default.heading: Create a Character
default.body: Come up with a name, draw their portrait, and write a short description for your outlaw.

default.heading: Swap the Outlaws
default.body: All of those characters get mixed into a pool. You will write a wanted poster for somebody else's creation.

default.heading: Fill In the Poster
default.body: Write any wanted condition you like, any bounty text you want, and the reason the town is after them.

default.heading: Vote for the Best
default.body: When the posters go up on the wanted wall, vote for the one you like most.
